# CWE-524 positive: process-wide cache of bearer tokens (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-524-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"sync"
)

var (
	tokenVault   = map[string]string{}
	tokenVaultMu sync.Mutex
)

func StoreSessionToken(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	tokenVaultMu.Lock()
	tokenVault[r.Header.Get("X-UID")] = r.Header.Get("Authorization")
	tokenVaultMu.Unlock()
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}

func FetchSessionToken(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	tokenVaultMu.Lock()
	tok := tokenVault[r.URL.Query().Get("uid")]
	tokenVaultMu.Unlock()
	w.Write([]byte(tok))
}
